name: Prince George Central Wellness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Prince George Central Wellness Center in Disputanta, VA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Temple Recreation Park
description: Temple Recreation Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Disputanta, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: The DiNK Spot
description: The DiNK Spot is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Disputanta, VA. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like trainers or lessons, youth programming, and lights.
